access_url.description: The URL that can be used to access the directory service.

alias.description: A unique alias assigned to the directory.

connect_settings.description: Settings related to connecting to the directory, including network and authentication details.

description.description: A brief description of the directory service.

dns_ip_addresses.description: The IP addresses of the DNS servers for the directory.

edition.description: The edition of the directory (e.g., Standard or Enterprise).

enable_sso.description: Indicates whether single sign-on (SSO) is enabled for the directory.

id.description: The unique identifier of the directory.

security_group_id.description: The ID of the security group associated with the directory.

short_name.description: The short name of the directory.

size.description: The size of the directory, typically indicating the number of users it can support.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the directory.

vpc_settings.description: Settings related to the VPC where the directory is deployed, including subnets and availability zones.
